$note: Manual flow: validate a pasted or referenced e-invoice XML against beliq's authority-pinned rules and return the verdict into the flow data chain. Replace the sample XML with {{ $trigger.payload.xml }} or a value read from an earlier step. Load it with: DIRECTUS_URL=... DIRECTUS_TOKEN=... node examples/import.mjs validate-uploaded-file.flow.json. Add your key as the BELIQ_API_KEY env var (or set the operation's API Key).

flow.name: beliq - Validate invoice XML
flow.description: Validate an e-invoice document and return the compliance verdict.
